AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Proves runtime planner selection of Diagnose_Loan_Audit under the Summarize Rule Violations topic when an auditor asks why a loan failed.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Veridact_Auditor_Copilot_v4_RuntimeSelection

expectation.expectedValue: The agent invokes the Diagnose_Loan_Audit action and lists the broken rules for the loan, naming each rule, its expected threshold, and the loan's actual value in plain words, deferring the final call to the human auditor.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Why did this loan fail? Audit case a05gL00000JtZ74QAF.

expectation.expectedValue: The agent invokes the Diagnose_Loan_Audit action and lists each broken rule with the expected value and the loan's actual value in plain words.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Which rules did this loan break? Audit case a05gL00000JtZ74QAF.
